description: IRS PDF template manifest. Source of truth for official form templates used in PDF rendering.

forms.title: U.S. Income Tax Return for an S Corporation
forms.notes: Official IRS fillable PDF with AcroForm fields (390 fields: 336 text + 54 checkbox)

forms.title: Schedule K-1 (Form 1120-S) - Shareholder's Share of Income
forms.notes: Schedule K-1 for individual shareholders (114 fields: 109 text + 5 checkbox)

forms.title: U.S. Return of Partnership Income
forms.notes: Partnership income tax return

forms.title: Schedule K-1 (Form 1065) - Partner's Share of Income
forms.notes: Schedule K-1 for individual partners

forms.title: U.S. Corporation Income Tax Return
forms.notes: C-Corporation income tax return

forms.title: Self-Employed Health Insurance Deduction
forms.notes: Self-employed health insurance deduction, generated per >2% S-Corp shareholder

forms.title: Cost of Goods Sold
forms.notes: Cost of Goods Sold - attachment to 1120-S, 1065, or 1120. 25 AcroForm fields (12 checkbox + 13 text)

forms.title: Rental Real Estate Income and Expenses of a Partnership or an S Corporation
forms.notes: Rental real estate - per-property income and expenses, attached to 1120-S or 1065. 221 AcroForm fields (all text)

forms.title: S Corporation Shareholder Stock and Debt Basis Limitations
forms.notes: Per-shareholder stock and debt basis tracking - attached to Schedule K-1 (1120-S). 188 AcroForm fields (12 checkbox + 176 text)

forms.title: Instructions for Form 1120-S
forms.notes: Official IRS instructions for Form 1120-S (S Corporation)

forms.title: Instructions for Form 1065
forms.notes: Official IRS instructions for Form 1065 (Partnership)

forms.title: Instructions for Form 1120
forms.notes: Official IRS instructions for Form 1120 (C Corporation)

forms.title: Application for Automatic Extension of Time To File Certain Business Income Tax, Information, and Other Returns
forms.notes: 1-page extension form: S-Corps (code 25), partnerships (code 09), C-Corps (code 12). 26 AcroForm fields (8 checkbox + 18 text)

forms.title: IRS e-file Signature Authorization for Form 1120-S
forms.notes: S-Corp e-file PIN signature authorization. 16 AcroForm fields (2 checkbox + 14 text). Page 2 is instructions only.

forms.title: U.S. S Corporation Income Tax Declaration for an IRS e-file Return
forms.notes: S-Corp e-file declaration (alternative to 8879-S). 28 AcroForm fields (6 checkbox + 22 text). Page 2 is instructions only.

forms.title: Georgia S Corporation Tax Return
forms.notes: Georgia Form 600S - S Corporation Tax Return. State form, not IRS.

forms.title: Sales of Business Property
forms.notes: Sales of business property (Section 1231, recapture, ordinary gains). 182 AcroForm fields (all text)

forms.title: Schedule D (Form 1120-S) - Capital Gains and Losses
forms.notes: S-Corp Schedule D - capital gains and losses and built-in gains. 53 AcroForm fields (2 checkbox + 51 text)

forms.title: Sales and Other Dispositions of Capital Assets
forms.notes: Per-transaction capital asset sales detail. Part I short-term, Part II long-term. 202 AcroForm fields (12 checkbox + 190 text)

forms.title: Compensation of Officers
forms.notes: Officer compensation schedule - up to 20 officers. Attached to 1120-S, 1065, or 1120. 125 AcroForm fields (all text)

forms.title: Depreciation and Amortization
forms.notes: Depreciation and amortization summary. Section 179, MACRS, amortization, listed property. 277 AcroForm fields (54 checkbox + 223 text)

forms.title: Profit or Loss From Farming
forms.notes: Schedule F (Form 1040) — farm income and expenses. 100 AcroForm fields. Page 2 is Part III accrual method + activity codes (skip for S-Corp cash method).
